name: demo-hiero-hooks
description: End-to-end demo for HIP-1195 Hiero Hooks on Hedera
_sdkNote: Using v2.83.0-beta.1 built from github:hiero-ledger/hiero-sdk-js#v2.83.0-beta.1. The SDK is a pnpm monorepo with workspace:* deps that npm cannot resolve directly. Tarballs in vendor/ were built with: git clone --depth 1 --branch v2.83.0-beta.1, pnpm install, task build, npm pack. Once v2.83.0 publishes to npm, change all three @hiero-ledger/* entries to the npm versions and delete vendor/.
